title: chrysanthemum cinereum
intro: Chrysanthemum cinereum, also known as the silver-leaved chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum cinereum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent diseases.
